title: `insert or replace into` fails silently for primary-key table in transactions
description:
### What happens?

```sql
duckdb tmp.db
v1.1.0 fa5c2fe15f
Enter ".help" for usage hints.
D create table t (i int primary key, s varchar);
D insert into t select i, i::string from generate_series(1, 100) s(i);
D begin;
D delete from t where i in (select i from generate_series(1, 20) s(i));
D insert or replace into t select i, (i * 2)::string from generate_series(1, 20) s(i);
D commit;
D select count(*), min(i), max(i) from t;
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ count_star() в”Ӯ min(i) в”Ӯ max(i) в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    int64     в”Ӯ int32  в”Ӯ int32  в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ           80 в”Ӯ     21 в”Ӯ    100 в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

### To Reproduce

```sql
create table t (i int primary key, s varchar);
insert into t select i, i::string from generate_series(1, 100) s(i);
begin;
delete from t where i in (select i from generate_series(1, 20) s(i));
insert or replace into t select i, (i * 2)::string from generate_series(1, 20) s(i);
commit;
select count(*), min(i), max(i) from t;
```

### OS:

macOS aarch64

### DuckDB Version:

1.1.0

### DuckDB Client:

CLI

### Hardware:

_No response_

### Full Name:

Fan Yang

### Affiliation:

ApeCloud

### What is the latest build you tested with? If possible, we recommend testing with the latest nightly build.

I have tested with a stable release

### Did you include all relevant data sets for reproducing the issue?

Not applicable - the reproduction does not require a data set

### Did you include all code required to reproduce the issue?

- [X] Yes, I have

### Did you include all relevant configuration (e.g., CPU architecture, Python version, Linux distribution) to reproduce the issue?

- [X] Yes, I have
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, age INTEGER CHECK (age >= 0));
DELETE FROM t1 WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM t1 WHERE age < 30);
INSERT INTO t1 SELECT id + 3, name, age + 5 FROM t1 WHERE id < 3;
key_bug_features: `insert or replace into` fails in transactions for primary-key table
